title: 6 Pack 300ml Round Food Containers with Lids Airtihgt, Plastic Reusable Snack Pots with Clip Lock, Leak-proof Small Storage Container Set Stackable for Yoghurt, Fruit, Snack
features: 【Airtight & Leakproof Security】Our food containers feature an easy-open quad-clip system with silicone-sealed lids, creating an impenetrable barrier against air and spills. Perfect for busy lifestyles - keeps contents fresh during storage and secure during transport. No more messy accidents!

【Crystal-Clear Visibility】Made from transparent BPA-free plastic, these snack pots let you instantly identify contents whether stacked in cupboards, displayed in fridges, or organized in pantries. Never waste time searching through mystery boxes again!

【Multi-Use Convenience】Versatile round snack containers ideal for snacks, leftovers, meal prep, and on-the-go lunches. Air-tight technology preserves freshness longer while the leakproof design makes them perfect for picnics, BBQs, festivals, and outdoor adventures. Microwave & freezer safe!

【Food-Grade Safety】Crafted from premium PP material that's durable, non-toxic, and certified food-safe. Preserves natural flavors without plastic odors. Your family deserves this chemical-free storage solution that prioritizes health and freshness.

【Space-Saving Stackable Design】Clever nesting shape maximizes storage in crowded kitchens. Effortlessly organize worktops, cabinets, and fridge shelves while maintaining quick access. The ultimate decluttering companion for modern households!
